title: AuditLogRequest
description: An audit log export request with status and download information.

id.description: The unique identifier of the audit log request.

status.description: The processing status of the request.

createdTime.description: The time when the request was created.

filter.description: The filters applied to this request.

downloadUrls.description: URLs to download the exported audit log data. Available when status is done.

expirationTime.description: The time when the download URLs will expire.
